title: ampelocissus compositifolia
intro: Ampelocissus compositifolia, also known as the vine of the Himalayas, is a species of flowering plant in the grape family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Ampelocissus compositifolia include relief from fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and processing the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as a tea or used in the form of a topical paste or powder.
